form.formComment: Racing well recently. Most recently 4th of 9 at Kempton Park All Weather on April 1 over 1200m, 4 len behind Expert Agent with 61kg at $4.50. The run before that won by 0.8 len at Kempton Park All Weather March 18 over 1200m defeating Brazen Idol carrying 60kg at $3.50. Certainly worth another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5.5). Racing well recently. Most recently 4th of 9 at Kempton Park All Weather on April 1 over 1200m, 4 len behind Expert Agent with 61kg at $4.50. The run before that won by 0.8 len at Kempton Park All Weather March 18 over 1200m defeating Brazen Idol carrying 60kg at $3.50. Certainly worth another chance.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of three months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation won by neck Lingfield All Weather January 12 over 1200m defeating Alasrae with 64.5kg at $3. First up last campaign second in a small field at Windsor August 4 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind First Principle with 62kg at $21. Well placed to pick up where he left off.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5). Gelding back from a spell of three months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation won by neck Lingfield All Weather January 12 over 1200m defeating Alasrae with 64.5kg at $3. First up last campaign second in a small field at Windsor August 4 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind First Principle with 62kg at $21. Well placed to pick up where he left off.

form.formComment: Resuming after six months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign sixth of 13 at Pontefract October 6 over 1200m, soft track; 6 len behind City Captain with 61kg at $67. Previously first up; second last of 13 at Ripon April 17 over 1200m, 11 len behind Dakota Gold carrying 59.5kg at $17. Has the ability to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Resuming after six months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign sixth of 13 at Pontefract October 6 over 1200m, soft track; 6 len behind City Captain with 61kg at $67. Previously first up; second last of 13 at Ripon April 17 over 1200m, 11 len behind Dakota Gold carrying 59.5kg at $17. Has the ability to run well.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months ran last of 15 at Doncaster on March 29 over 1400m, 38 len behind Melvin Udall carrying 58.5kg at $5. Previously second-up 5th of 10 at Newmarket (July) on July 19 over 1200m, 4 len behind Many A Star with 59.5kg at $19. Will benefit from that run and can feature in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4). Second-up. First-up after five months ran last of 15 at Doncaster on March 29 over 1400m, 38 len behind Melvin Udall carrying 58.5kg at $5. Previously second-up 5th of 10 at Newmarket (July) on July 19 over 1200m, 4 len behind Many A Star with 59.5kg at $19. Will benefit from that run and can feature in the finish.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run 4th of 7 at Kempton Park All Weather on March 18 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Em Four carrying 60.5kg at $6.50. The start before that 4th of 7 at Kempton Park All Weather on February 25 over 1200m, 2 len behind Combustion carrying 60.5kg at $17. Not far away last start. Worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Racing well recently. At the latest run 4th of 7 at Kempton Park All Weather on March 18 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Em Four carrying 60.5kg at $6.50. The start before that 4th of 7 at Kempton Park All Weather on February 25 over 1200m, 2 len behind Combustion carrying 60.5kg at $17. Not far away last start. Worth including.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of 11 weeks. Finished off last preparation second last of 7 at Wolverhampton January 23 over 1000m, 6 len behind El Bufalo carrying 61kg at $19. When resuming last campaign ran last of 11 at Newcastle All Weather November 27 over 1200m, 8 len behind Filly One carrying 60kg at $11. See how he returns.

formComments.title: TAB

When resuming last campaign ran last of 11 at Newcastle All Weather November 27 over 1200m, 8 len behind Filly One carrying 60kg at $11. See how he returns.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation when last of 8 at Goodwood September 2 over 1000m, on rain affected going; 35 len behind Another Baar with 58kg at $13. When resuming last campaign second last of 7 at Goodwood August 22 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Smooth Silesie with 63.5kg at $4.30. Faces a tough essay.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-9.5). First-up. Finished off last preparation when last of 8 at Goodwood September 2 over 1000m, on rain affected going; 35 len behind Another Baar with 58kg at $13. When resuming last campaign second last of 7 at Goodwood August 22 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Smooth Silesie with 63.5kg at $4.30. Faces a tough essay.

form.formComment: She is resuming after a six-and-a-half months break. Not seen since she finished last in a small field at this track September 22 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind Autumn Rose with 61.5kg at $12. On debut sixth of 9 at Haydock Park July 18 over 1410m, 8 len behind Headmaster carrying 58kg at $81. Unlikely to trouble the top few.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5). She is resuming after a six-and-a-half months break. On debut sixth of 9 at Haydock Park July 18 over 1410m, 8 len behind Headmaster carrying 58kg at $81. Unlikely to trouble the top few.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start 3rd of 10 at Wolverhampton on March 17 over 1400m, neck behind Cill Mocheallog with 58kg at $6.50. The start before that 2nd of 11 at Wolverhampton on March 3 over 1400m, nose behind The Dark Baron carrying 60.5kg at $13. Expected to feature prominently again.
